subcodes.first_line: This is an Epistle from Our presence unto him who hath drawn nigh unto God, the All-Protecting, the Self-Subsisting. Blessed art thou, inasmuch as thou hast inhaled the fragrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی من تقرب الی الله المهیمن القیوم طوبی لک بما وجدت عرف
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @chastisement and requital, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
